INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('e9fec48b-c74b-40e5-81f4-5ec4aecb6b7c', 'According to the passage, which statement is best supported?', 'Psychologists testing memory task 14 reported that participants who slept eight hours recalled word lists more accurately than those who stayed awake, even when both groups studied equally long.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"The passage links coral larvae settle on bare rock to reef health","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage explicitly discusses coral larvae settle on bare rock."},{"id":"B","text":"Reefs never recover once algae appear","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted by the passage''s account of recovery."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage rejects all scientific study of reefs","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage cites research; it does not reject science."},{"id":"D","text":"Coral larvae cannot survive on rock","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage says larvae settle on bare rock."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The correct choice restates a detail the passage supports: coral larvae settle on bare rock.', NULL, 'Information and Ideas', 'Central Ideas and Details', 'reading_writing', 'information', 'CID', NULL, 'medium', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('f593beb0-e973-4ff4-9814-2b4e61199574', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Educators reviewing literacy program 16 concluded that students who discussed readings in pairs improved comprehension scores more than those who answered worksheets alone.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Ecological interactions can shape reef recovery","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage centers on grazing, algae, and coral settlement."},{"id":"B","text":"Reefs never recover once algae appear","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted by the passage''s account of recovery."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage rejects all scientific study of reefs","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage cites research; it does not reject science."},{"id":"D","text":"Coral larvae cannot survive on rock","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage says larvae settle on bare rock."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage explains how grazing and coral settlement interact to affect reef health.', NULL, 'Information and Ideas', 'Central Ideas and Details', 'reading_writing', 'information', 'CID', NULL, 'medium', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

Without grazing, algae can smother reefs within a single season.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"The passage links parrotfish grazing limits algae growth to reef health","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage explicitly discusses parrotfish grazing limits algae growth."},{"id":"B","text":"Reefs never recover once algae appear","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted by the passage''s account of recovery."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage rejects all scientific study of reefs","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage cites research; it does not reject science."},{"id":"D","text":"Coral larvae cannot survive on rock","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage says larvae settle on bare rock."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The correct choice restates a detail the passage supports: parrotfish grazing limits algae growth.', NULL, 'Information and Ideas', 'Central Ideas and Details', 'reading_writing', 'information', 'CID', NULL, 'medium', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('8005cf41-f76f-40d3-9dc8-e7d2a145f413', 'Which finding from the passage, if true, would best support the author''s claim about adaptation?', 'Economists analyzing market 12 observed that small retailers adapted faster than national chains when supply chains stalled, partly because they could reorder from local wholesalers within days.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"National chains never order from wholesalers","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Irrelevant to retailer adaptation speed."},{"id":"B","text":"Local wholesalers could restock small retailers within days","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Directly explains why small retailers could adapt quickly."},{"id":"C","text":"Supply chains never stall","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicts the passage''s premise about stalled supply chains."},{"id":"D","text":"Printed maps spread faster than caravans","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Topic of a different passage theme."}]'::jsonb, 'B', 'The passage claims small retailers adapted faster than national chains; rapid restocking from local wholesalers supports that claim.', NULL, 'Information and Ideas', 'Command of Evidence', 'reading_writing', 'information', 'COE', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
